Bare-Handed

On this page

Topic Title ​

Starting from Scratch ​

[Write everything you can produce from a blank page, with no books or notes. Allow blanks. Allow confusion. This is the raw material.]

Where It Broke ​

[One precise sentence identifying the exact point where the derivation or argument stalled.]

Repair ​

[How the gap was filled: a textbook section, a conversation, an AI query, or an admission that it remains unresolved.]

Rebuilt ​

[If successfully reconstructed from scratch, record the date. Otherwise, leave this section empty.]

Rebuilt from scratch on YYYY-MM-DD.
